Name: First Student
Description:
As the leading pupil transportation solutions provider for school districts in North America, First Student provides the best start and finish to every school day. Our teams complete five and a half million student journeys each day, moving more students than all U.S. airlines combined. We operate more than 44,500 vehicles in 41 U.S. states and 8 Canadian provinces/territories. 

What makes First Student the right choice for your school district's needs?

Our partnerships: 
We believe great transportation is always the result of close, trusted partnerships with the school districts we serve. Understanding that needs change sometimes throughout the school year, our goal is to remain responsive to your district's needs. We work closely with school districts to ensure the transportation solutions we provide represent a collective, forward-thinking response to the needs of your district and community.

Our engagement: 
We believe education offers a child – and their family – the foundation needed to lead a productive and successful life. We support education by making sure children have a safe and reliable way to get to and from school each day. Students start and end their school days with us, and we recognize the opportunity we have to impact each student’s day in a positive manner.

Our people: 
Our people are our advantage. With a team of highly-trained drivers and the industry’s strongest safety record, we’re able to leverage the best practices, technologies and processes needed to deliver quality, consistent service.

Visit http://www.firststudentinc.com for more information about how First Student is Caring for students, today, tomorrow, together.

Name: Sertran Transportes
Durham School Services
Description:
Durham School Services is a full-service student transportation provider, committed to getting students to school safely, on time and ready to learn. We provide customer focused transportation services including home-to-school, special needs, and field trip transportation, as well as charter trips for districts, organizations and consumers across the United States.

Durham can trace its history back to a three-bus company started in 1917 in the San Gabriel Valley of California, providing student transportation service to the Rosemead School District, a community we still serve today. In its early years, Durham concentrated in special education transportation. This specialization has helped us to nurture a unique commitment to quality service that remains throughout our company today.

At Durham School Services, our number one priority is the safety of the students we transport; we work tirelessly to ensure the peace of mind of those who have entrusted their children to us. Safety, above all, is the cornerstone on which we build everything.

Durham School Services is headquartered in Lisle, Illinois.

Name: Beacon Mobility
Description:
At Beacon Mobility, we stand as a family of transportation
companies, united by our dedication to serving the distinct
needs of our customers. Harnessing the power of connected

together, we deliver tailored mobility solutions that free up
local teams to focus on what matters most.
Beacon employs a team of over 20,000 employees across 30 partner companies, running 14,000 vehicles and serving our Special Ed, Regular Ed, Paratransit, and NEMT customers in 25 states. 

Our dedicated and compassionate team takes pride in their ability to create customized, mobility-based solutions that empower people to get where they need to go.

Name: Diversified Transportation Ltd.
Description:
Welcome to Diversified Transportation Ltd.
Motor Coach Services  On-Site Transportation Shuttle Services. 

The Leader in Employee Transportation Across Alberta for over 50 years.  

With a combined fleet of over 1000 units, Diversified is well positioned to provide world class transportation services across Northern Alberta.  Contact us for your transportation needs Fort McMurray 780-743-2244., Edmonton 780-468-6771. You can download our FREE App to track your bus or your staff here --> mybusroute.ca 
 
Our Fort McMurray Oil Sands division services the passenger transportation needs of the Oil Sands industry in northern Alberta, ensuring that employees reach their destinations safely and comfortably.   Operating under the Diversified brand, we transport over 10 million workers to and from work sites every year.  Whether it’s the start of a workday or the end of a shift, Oil Sands employees have come to rely upon a relaxing and safe trip with our Diversified Oil Sands service, which offers comfortable seating and complimentary Wi-Fi.
 
Our Edmonton division continues to support the petrochemical, energy and construction sectors by providing safe and reliable transportation of the Alberta workforce. We work closely with clients and engineer pre-determined pick up and drop off routes and schedules that make sense and ensure that workers will reach your worksite on time and safe. At the end of the workday or shift employees welcome the opportunity to board our motorcoaches, relax and enjoy the ride home while not having to struggle with heavy traffic volumes and adverse weather conditions.

Diversified Transportation is a member of the Pacific Western Transportation family of companies.
For information on our Transportation Services, or for career opportunities in Alberta, Visit http://www.dtl.ca/careers

Fort McMurray
920 Memorial Drive. 

Edmonton  
8351 McIntyre Road

Name: Stock Transportation
Description:
Stock Transportation Ltd. was founded by brothers Jeff and Jerry Stock in Bailieboro, Ontario, in 1958 and their sons continued to build upon the original foundation. This family-owned and operated company has provided transportation services to students and charter passengers throughout Canada and the United States for over half a century. 

Today, Stock operates more than 3,400 school buses and serves school districts throughout Ontario and Alberta. Our corporate offices, located in Markham ON, house the administrative and support functions for the company, and our local customer service centers (CSCs) are supported by regional operations teams located throughout the country. As a national company, we have a wealth of resources available to our customers, while maintaining an unmatched level of support at the local level.

Stock Transportation has a strong record of success and decades of experience in pupil transportation, and we are confident we can provide exceptional service to your district. We will remain continually focused on delivering our service promise:

Getting students to school safely, on time and ready to learn.

Name: Grupo Braslectra
Description:
O Grupo Braslectra, foi fundado em 1997, formado por empresas especializadas no setor de transporte executivo de passageiros com carros, vans, micro-ônibus e ônibus, oferecendo um atendimento personalizado e de alta qualidade, visando sempre a segurança dos nossos clientes.

Hoje somos constituídos por 04 empresas: Diretriz Locações e Transportes, Braslectra Locações e Transportes, Eco Polo Brasil Transportes e B.A.J Transportes.

Celebrando 26 anos da nossa história em 2023, atualmente o Grupo Braslectra atua em todo o Brasil, predominantemente pela região Sudeste, utilizando veículos executivos, vans, micro-ônibus e ônibus, nas diferentes áreas de atuação: executivo (onshore e offshore), fretamento, turismo, e rodoviário.

Seguimos sempre, em busca da melhoria contínua corporativa e organizacional, buscando entregar um melhor serviço aos nossos clientes, transportando nossos passageiros com maior conforto, segurança e pontualidade.

Description:
SOUTHLAND Transportation is committed to safety and service in the people transportation business. SOUTHLAND operates school, charter, commuter, and specialized transportation buses throughout Alberta and in Saskatchewan.

It was the first school bus company in Canada to have its training program nationally recognized and certified by the Motor Carrier Passenger Council of Canada and is a proud member of the Student Transportation Association of Saskatchewan, Alberta Student Transportation Advisory Council, Alberta School Bus Contractors Association, and Partners in Compliance.

Description:

Name: Accra Business School
Description:
ABS is a prestigious Christian Business School accredited to offer a range of globally recognised postgraduate, undergraduate and professional programmes in a Christ-centred scholarly environment that integrates faith and learning. The institution dates from 2004 when it was founded as a training institution by Bishop Gideon and Lady Olivia Titi-Ofei. It has enjoyed three separate name designations prior to assuming its current name, each reflective of its educational journey. First, it was founded as the African Centre for Leadership and Human Resource Development (AFRILEAD) to provide quality affordable short-term training to very busy professionals. Second, in 2010 it became the Graduate School of Governance and Leadership to coincide with its expansion into undergraduate programmes.

Our new name – Accra Business School – emphasizes the importance of our location, specialty and specificity of education provision. In a short period of less than 20 years, we have established ourselves as one of the most successful providers of private sector higher education in Ghana with a stellar reputation in both Ghana and internationally as evidenced by our portfolio of collaborative partnerships that we have secured. This success has been achieved by virtue of inspired and committed sector experienced leadership, being attuned to the needs and requirements of Ghanaian students, robust commitment to quality and regulatory compliance and providing quality education at affordable fees

Name: TRANSAY A.Ş.
Description:
1989 yılında personel ve öğrenci taşıma alanında hizmete başlayan Transay, bugün 10.000' i aşkın araçtan oluşan modern filosu, deneyimli personeli ve öncü kalite ve hizmet anlayışıyla iş dünyasının önde gelen temsilcileri tarafından tercih edilen firmadır. 

Hizmet ağımız,

Bankacılık, Finans ve Sigorta
Telekomünikasyon, Bilişim ve Teknoloji
Enerji, Otomotiv ve Makine Sanayi
Reklam, Pazarlama ve Dağıtım
Taşıma ve Lojistik
Kimya, İlaç ve Gıda
Perakende Sektörü
Turizm, İnşaat ve diğer sektörler

Transay bugün, Esentepe'deki merkez ofisinin yanısıra toplam 1.500 m² alanda kurulu Gebze Şubesi ve Güneşli ofis ve Zeytinburnu ofislerimizde binek araçlarından otobüslere uzanan çeşitlilikteki 10.000'i aşkın araçla hizmet veren modern ve büyük filosu, 750 kişiye yaklaşan deneyimli personel kadrosuyla hizmet vermektedir.

Transay, sektördeki lider konumunu, "İnsan Hayatı Taşıma"nın sorumluluğunu her an gözönünde bulundurmasına ve güvenlik, kalite, dakiklik prensiplerini hizmet standardı haline getirmesine borçludur. 
Transay'ın kalite anlayışındaki öncülüğü, 1999 yılında İstanbul'da personel taşıma hizmeti veren firmalar arasında ilk olarak ISO-9001:2000 Kalite Güvence Sistemi ve TSE belgelerini almasıyla tescillenmiştir. Kalite Sistemi'ni sürekli güncelleştiren Transay, TS-18001:2004 İş Sağlığı ve Güvenliği Sertifikası'nın da sahibidir. 

Personel taşımacılığı başta olmak üzere, kişiye/gruplara özel her türlü ulaşım ihtiyacına cevap verebilecek anlayış ve donanıma sahip olan Transay Şirketler Grubu, Türk iş dünyasının en büyük ve en önemli temsilcilerine hizmet veriyor olmakla gururludur.

Transay gururla taşıdığı bu güveni kalite, dakiklik ve güvenlik ten oluşan üç temel prensip üzerinde inşa etmiştir.

Name: Birla Open Minds International School Ambikapur
Description:
Welcome to Birla Open Minds International School Ambikapur! 

We are a premier institution committed to nurturing young minds and empowering them with knowledge, skills, and values essential for success in today's dynamic world. At Birla Open Minds Ambikapur, we offer a holistic educational experience that blends rigorous academic curriculum with diverse co-curricular activities, fostering the overall development of our students.

 Academics: Our curriculum is designed to foster critical thinking, creativity, and problem-solving skills. We offer a comprehensive range of subjects taught by experienced educators, ensuring students receive a well-rounded education that prepares them for future challenges.

 Co-curricular Activities: Beyond academics, we believe in providing opportunities for students to explore their interests and talents. Our school offers a wide array of extracurricular activities including sports, arts, music, drama, and community service initiatives, allowing students to discover and pursue their passions.

 Innovation & Technology: We embrace innovation and leverage technology to enhance the learning experience. Our classrooms are equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and interactive learning tools, enabling students to engage with content in dynamic and immersive ways.

 Global Perspective: As an international school, we celebrate diversity and promote global awareness among our students. Through multicultural experiences and exchange programs, we encourage students to appreciate different cultures, perspectives, and languages, preparing them to thrive in a globalized world.

 Experienced Faculty: Our dedicated team of educators is passionate about nurturing each student's potential and providing personalized support to facilitate their academic and personal growth. We foster a collaborative learning environment where students are encouraged to question, explore, and innovate.

Name: Cattani S/A. Transportes e Turismo
Description: Cattani S.A. Transportes e Turismo atua no segmento de transporte de passageiros na modalidade de fretamento, com ênfase e expertise em áreas remotas e atividades severas, tendo sua sede na cidade de Pato Branco/PR e unidades no Estado do Pará e Minas Gerais.

Name: Galéo
Description:
Spécialisé dans le transport de voyageurs et les services à la mobilité, le Groupe Galéo est présent sur tout le territoire du Grand Sud, au travers de ses 8 sociétés dédiées au transport de voyageurs et aux activités urbaines, interurbaines, tourisme et occasionnel. Issues d’entreprises familiales au professionnalisme reconnu sur leurs territoires d’implantation, les sociétés du Groupe sont basées tout au long de l’axe rhodanien et sur une partie du littoral.
Ainsi, Galéo associe la dimension humaine de sociétés familiales et locales avec la force et l’expertise d’un grand Groupe, et intervient aujourd’hui pour de nombreux clients privés et collectivités dans les régions Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Occitanie et Provence-Alpes-Côte-d’Azur. 

Au quotidien, nos équipes développent les activités transports et mobilités qui nous sont confiées, et accompagnent les collectivités et clients privés dans la conception et la mise en œuvre des services : transports réguliers urbains, interurbains et scolaires, services à la demande, transport de personnel, locations de cars, transport touristique et occasionnel, lignes internationales et nationales. 

Notre objectif : accompagner l'évolution des modes de transport vers des solutions de mobilité et grâce à notre capacité à innover et à nous adapter à une demande en perpétuelle évolution, dans une vision orientée vers l’avenir et le développement durable. 

Nos sociétés : 
• Les Courriers Rhodaniens (Saint-Péray 07, Mions 69, Annonay 07, Pélussin 42, Salaise 38) 
• Les Cars de l'Eyrieux (Le Cheylard, Saint-Sauveur de Montagut et Saint-Agrève 07) 
• Les Autocars Gineys, (Montélimar et Dieulefit 26) 
• Les Autocars Fayard, (Anneyron 26) 
• La STAMontélibus (Montélimar 26) 
• Autocars Jaccon (Monistrol 43) 
• Autocars Raoux (Caumont sur Durance 84 et Ales 30)

Name: STCR
Description:
En tant que leaders de notre activité, nous sommes connus pour offrir des services de transport fiables et sécurisés aux entreprises et institutions, facilitant ainsi le déplacement du personnel entre leurs domiciles et leurs lieux de travail. Nous mettons l'accent sur la ponctualité, la sécurité et le confort, pour répondre au mieux aux attentes et besoins spécifiques de  notre clientèle.

En plus du transport de personnel, STCR peut également offrir des services de location de bus pour divers événements ou besoins spécifiques. Avec une flotte de véhicules adaptée et bien entretenue, et un personnel formé et expérimenté, STCR s'assure de fournir des solutions de transport efficaces et adaptées aux entreprises de la région.

Enfin, STCR joue un rôle important dans la réduction de la congestion routière et de l'empreinte carbone en encourageant l'utilisation du transport en commun pour les trajets professionnels, contribuant ainsi à un environnement plus durable

Name: Grupo Sem Fronteiras
Description:
Somos uma empresa dedicada a prestar serviços de transporte de fretamento e turismo, bem como locação de equipamentos com garantia de excelência.
Nossa frota é frequentemente atualizada com veículos novos e todos os serviços prestados de acordo com as diretrizes dos órgãos regulamentadores (DER e ANTT).
Nos preocupamos sempre com a segurança, confiabilidade e pontualidade no atendimento, limpeza dos veículos, valorização dos recursos humanos e excelência no atendimento.

Name: Attridge Transportation
Description:
Since 1976, Attridge has been a trusted provider of transportation services. What began with only 2 taxis, 2 station wagons, and a big vision, has grown into a fleet of over 1400 buses servicing 8 transportation consortia. With a variety of buses to accommodate each trip's needs, we provide a ride that is safe, comfortable and reliable. Offering transportation services to "The Golden Horseshoe," from the Hamilton Wentworth region to the City of Toronto, we have taken people to destinations all over North America. 

Our fleet includes Highway Coaches which seat 56 and are clean, comfortable and spacious. They have plenty of leg room, overhead television units and closed storage bins. We also have Activity Buses, which are extra spacious and seat 36 passengers. They are modified school buses, with reclining seats, air conditioning and LCD monitors connected to a DVD player. The vehicles have overhead parcel racks, undercarriage storage, and a row of seats removed at the back for additional storage. Our team of bus drivers are thoroughly trained and provide professional and friendly service. 

For all your events, Attridge is the safe, reliable and economical way to transport your group to a local destination.

Name: Transay Taşımacılık Ve Personel Hizmetleri Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
Firmamız 1989 yılından itibaren personel taşıma işini, gelişmeleri ve yenilikleri takip ederek kendini yenileyerek başarı ile bu günlere gelmiştir.
Şirket merkezi İstanbul Mecidiyeköy’de olup İzmir de şubemiz Gebze ve Güneşli de ofislerimiz firmalara yakından  hizmet vermektedir. Merkezi İstanbul da olan bazı şirketlerin Ankara, İzmir, Trabzon, Adana Samsun, Antalya, Diyarbakır, Erzurum Bursa ve Kocaeli illerinde ki lokasyonlarında  personel servis taşımacılığı hizmeti vermeye  devam etmektedir. Bunun yanı sıra İstanbul ve Ankara illerinde binek araç ve VIP araçlar ile transfer hizmeti sağlamaktayız. Bu hizmetleri İleri sürüş, İlk yardım ve Davranış kuralları eğitimlerini tamamlamış, tecrübeli sürücüler ile periyodik bakımları tamamlanmış, şartnamelere uygun çeşitli marka ve model araçlar ile vermekteyiz.  Transay Sigorta hizmetleri tarafından sahadaki araçlarımızın  kasko, trafik ve koltuk sigortaları yapılıp takip edilmektedir. Ayrıca S.O.S  Sağlık Hizmetleri ile arzu edilmeyen vakalara karşı kapsamlı hizmet sözleşmesi yapılmıştır. Bu hizmetlerimiz 1999 senesinden beri İSO 9001:2008 Kalite Güvence sistemleri gereği doküman halinde muhafaza edilmektedir.             
Kalitemizi bilgi ve tecrübemizi şayet bizlere fırsat verdiğiniz takdirde sizlerle paylaşmaktan gurur duyacağımızı arz ederiz.

Name: Grupo Araujo
Description:
Em Março de 2003, com a necessidade de abrir um negócio por questões de sobrevivência, nasceu a ideia de montar uma locadora de carros; sem conhecimento e sem planejamento; mesmo assim, se buscou incansavelmente a consolidação da marca ARAUJO nesse mercado tão concorrido; onde grandes empresas já lideravam de maneira inquestionável. 
Em 2006 surgiu a oportunidade de ampliação do negócio, migrando parcialmente para locação de ônibus; que mais tarde se consolida como a maior Empresa de Fretamento genuinamente Maranhense. Sendo seus sócios, grandes empreendedores; tomaram a decisão de adquirir uma Empresa que atuava no sistema de transporte coletivo semiurbano na região metropolitana de São Luis do Maranhão. Um ano mais tarde, montamos a 1ª estrutura em Ourilândia do Norte para atendimento na construção do projeto ONÇA PUMA, seguida por Altamira na construção do projeto da USINA DE BELO MONTE e Canaã dos Carajás na construção do projeto S11D, no Estado do Pará. Em 2016, implantamos o projeto piloto “EXPRESSO METROPOLITANO” ligando o município de São José de Ribamar a São Luis do Maranhão, com ônibus novos, usando um sistema que permite ao usuário saber com exatidão a localização do ÔNIBUS que deseja tomar, proporcionando maior SEGURANÇA e COMODIDADE; considerando o tempo mínimo que ficará exposto nas paradas a espera desse transporte, pois o tempo de chegada à sua parada, poderá ser provisionado através de aplicativo disponibilizado em celular, tablet e Smartphone. 
Nesse mesmo ano, iniciamos o projeto TRAVESSIA do governo do Estado, com um transporte especial de cadeirantes, utilizando VANS adaptadas para essa modalidade e crianças portadoras de microcefalia, em automóveis equipados com cadeiras e bebe conforto; tudo dentro do padrão de segurança determinado pelos órgãos competentes. Na atualidade, temos a VCA Transportes, Araujo Transportes e Transporte Requinte, que juntas formam o Grupo Araujo, atuando na modalidade Fretamento e no Transporte Coletivo Semiurbano da

Name: Pabna Zilla School
Description:
Pabna Zilla School (Bengali: পাবনা জিলা স্কুল) is the oldest high school in the Pabna District of Bangladesh. It provides education from class Three to Ten. It has two shifts - morning and day. The morning shift starts at 7:15 am and ends at 11.45am. And the day shift starts at 12:30 pm and ends at 5:15 pm. This only applies from class 6 to 10. From class 3 to 5 time slot is lesser than above for both shifts. Each shift has a 20 minutes tiffin break after the 3rd period.

Though it is a boys' school, it has male and female teachers. The school has one headmaster and two assistant headmaster. It has separate groups of teachers for morning and day shift. The school has a playground, three buildings (the Administrative Building, the Academic Building, and the Science Building), one hall room, a hostel and a mosque. There is a library in ground floor of hostel with 2000+ books & a librarian. Students can borrow books and read books. It has a computer laboratory, two permanent multimedia class rooms and three individual laboratories for physics, chemistry and biology. This school has a big ground where students do their assembly and participate in various sports at tiffin period and after school. Even there are individual sports classes for each section ones in a week. There are two cycle garage (one is beside the hostel, and other is beside the academic building). There is a Shaheed Minar on one side of the playground.

Name: Consórcio Giz e Lápis
Description:
O Consórcio Giz & Lápis formado pelas concessionárias Transportes Capellini Ltda. e Santa Cecília Turismo Ltda. (Sancetur), presta serviços diários para mais de 13 mil estudantes. A frota é composta por 247 veículos, dos quais 219 ônibus e 28 microônibus, dotados de ar-condicionado e muita tecnologia embarcada. A frota operacional tem 230 veículos, a maioria zero-quilômetro.

Todos os dias, são realizadas mais de 1.000 viagens para 80 estabelecimentos de ensino municipais e estaduais, creches e unidades de ensino técnico-profissionalizante do Serviço Nacional da Indústria (Senai).

MEIO AMBIENTE X TECNOLOGIA = CONFORTO

O Giz & Lápis mantém em sua frota veículos seguros e menos poluentes. Boa parte da frota está equipada com motores dotados de tecnologia Euro 6 e em conformidade com a legislação ambiental vigente no Brasil.

Todos os veículos contam com validadores embarcados, para controlar o embarque e desembarque dos alunos. É uma solução inovadora para o transporte escolar de Paulínia. 

Com o validador embarcado, não há necessidade de barreiras físicas como, por exemplo, a catraca. Um diferencial que permite aos estudantes terem acesso mais fácil aos veículos. E, quando estão no interior, também garante mais segurança na locomoção com materiais escolares e mochilas.

Além disso, todos os veículos possuem câmeras de monitoramento por vídeo, que captam e registram as imagens em tempo real durante o transporte em todas as viagens.

Name: Stocker Bus Company, Inc.
Description:
Stocker Bus Company, a family owned and operated business, has been servicing Northern NJ for over fifty years. Charles W. Stocker, it’s founder started as a substitute driver for a local school bus company, Struble’s Bus Company. He started Stocker Bus Company in 1970 with one bus and one driver servicing the local school district. He then purchased Struble’s Bus Company and proceeded to grow the company. Once Kittatinny and McKeown were established, he had found his identity in the school bus industry and purchased other companies. During his tenure, his wife, three daughters and son in law were employed at the company, but in 1988, he suffered a massive stroke and his youngest daughter and her husband were left to manage the business.

Denise purchased it from her father in 1991. At that time, there were 45 vehicles servicing six local school districts in Sussex and Warren Counties. Currently, the company has 64 vehicles servicing thirteen school districts in Sussex, Warren and Morris Counties.

She was a member, served as secretary, and served as president, of the Sussex County Contractors Association, was a trustee of the New Jersey School Bus Owners Association, and is a member of the New Jersey School Bus Contractors Association.

Denise and her office staff have taken the School Transportation Supervisors Program and received certification.

Stocker Bus Company has provided safe and courteous transportation for the entire community including, schools, churches, camps, non profit organizations and private groups for over fifty years and four generations.

Denise’s son, granddaughter and grandson in law are currently employed with the company with the direction to move the business forward.

Description:
חברה מנוסה וותיקה המספקת שירותי הסעות עובדים - טיולי אתרים. 
אנחנו מתמחים בכל הקשור למתן שירותי הסעות לעובדים. מאחורינו ניסיון עשיר ורב שנים בהסעת עובדים בכל רחבי בארץ וזאת לצרכים שוטפים וצרכים מיוחדים של חברות, ארגונים, מוסדות, רשויות מקומיות, רשתות, בתי מלון, חברות הייטק ומפעלים מתחומי עיסוק שונים.
הסעות לעובדים ברכבים בטוחים ואמינים
לרשות לקוחותינו עומד צי רכבים חדיש ומאובזר המתאים בגודל ובאיבזור שלו לכל קנה מידה של חברה הצריכה הסעה לעובדים שלה באופן שוטף, החל ב - 10 מקומות ישיבה לרכב ועד 60 מקומות. 

ברכבים מטפל מערך אחזקה שוטף לאור תקני בטיחות ישראליים ובינלאומיים, לרבות תקן בטיחות ISO 9301 ותקן איכות ISO 9001. על הנושא מפקחים שני קציני בטיחות תעבורה מטעמנו אשר מונו על ידי אגף איגוד קציני בטיחות. כמו כן, אנו מעסיקים נהגים אחראיים, מנוסים וזהירים העוברים ימי השתלמות ורענון שוטפים בנושאי בטיחות, תקנות ודרישות חוק עדכניות.

הסעות עובדים לאירועי חברה, טיולי גיבוש של יום או יומיים בארץ של חברות בארץ - אם אתם חברה גדולה שמעסיקה מספר עובדים גדול בין 100 ל 200 עובדים הפתרון הנכון, המתאים והמומלץ ביותר עבורכם הוא להשתמש בשירותי הסעות. להציע לעובדים שלכם שירותי הסעה באוטובוסים או מיניבוסים  (תלוי במספר העובדים שלכם)  שיאספו אותם ממקום העבודה ויחזירו אותם למקום העבודה או הביתה.

Name: Az-Al Turizm

Her geçen gün kaliteli ve güvenli taşımacılığın adresi olarak adını duyuran firmamız ”Geleceği Taşıyoruz…” sloganımız ile bütünleşti. O yıllarda sadece öğrenci taşımacılığı yaparken 1999 yılından itibaren kapsamını genişletmiş; servis sektöründe personel ve turizm taşımacılığında da faaliyet göstermeye başlamıştır. Kuruluş tarihinden itibaren sektörde, genç ve dinamik yapısı ile adından birçok yerde söz ettiren, servis taşımacılığı alanında her geçen gün yenilenen ve büyüyen araç filosuyla yıllardır sizlere ve sevdiklerinize hizmet vermekteyiz.
Bize emanet edilen geleceğin bilgeleri olan çocuklarımıza AZ-AL Turizmin kaliteli ve güvenli taşımacılığı ile hizmet vermeyi bir yaşam felsefesi olarak benimseyip, memnuniyetinizi kendimize amaç edinmiş bulunmaktayız.

Name: Tiny Tots Preschool
Description:
Tiny Tots Preschool was founded in 1985 with the goal of fostering young learners' entire development via the provision of excellent early childhood education. Through captivating play-based learning, our qualified educators foster a cosy and welcoming atmosphere where kids can flourish. Our curriculum is created to encourage creativity, confidence, and academic preparation in every child, since we think that every kid is unique and that this will set them up for future success in both school and life.

At Tiny Tots, we prioritize the development of fundamental abilities via engaging activities that foster mental, emotional, social, and physical development. Our dynamic classrooms are stocked with developmentally appropriate materials that promote inquiry and learning, letting kids explore at their own speed. We place a strong emphasis on play as an essential part of education, as it fosters friendships, problem-solving abilities, and a lifetime love of learning in kids.

With the addition of art, music, and outdoor activities, our inclusive curriculum makes sure that every child has the chance to express themselves and interact with their friends. Additionally, we place a high value on open lines of contact with parents in order to create a welcoming environment that promotes family participation in the educational process.

Tiny Tots Preschool has had many improvements under the direction of Principal Mrs Nandita Sarfare, including better facilities and raised academic standards. With the opening of "We Tots Preschool," our new branch, we are pleased to provide daycare and after-school activities in addition to our preschool programs. Come along with us at Tiny Tots Preschool as we set out on a path of personal development, exploration, and lifelong learning!

Name: ste atermal transport
Description:
En tant que leader dans le domaine du transport de personnel, Atermal Transport se distingue par son engagement à offrir des services de transport sûrs, fiables et personnalisés aux entreprises et aux organisations. Nous facilitons les déplacements quotidiens des employés entre leur domicile et leur lieu de travail, tout en mettant un point d’honneur sur la ponctualité, la sécurité et le confort. Notre objectif est de répondre de manière optimale aux attentes spécifiques de nos clients, en leur offrant une expérience de transport de haute qualité.

Outre le transport des employés, Atermal Transport propose également des services de location d’autobus adaptés à une variété d’événements ou de besoins particuliers. Notre flotte de véhicules, moderne et climatisée, est soigneusement entretenue pour garantir un confort maximal. De plus, notre personnel, formé et expérimenté, est à votre disposition pour assurer une prestation de transport fluide et agréable.

Atermal Transport joue également un rôle clé dans la promotion de la mobilité durable en réduisant la congestion routière et l’empreinte carbone. En encourageant l’utilisation des transports collectifs pour les déplacements professionnels, nous contribuons activement à la protection de l’environnement et à la création de communautés plus vertes et plus responsables.

Avec notre savoir-faire, notre flexibilité et notre engagement envers l’excellence, Atermal Transport est prête à accompagner les entreprises de la région avec des solutions de transport innovantes et adaptées à leurs besoins.

Welcome to Das Karate Academy (DKA) or is also known as “Dasdojo”. You now have taken the first step to improving your mind and body through Martial Arts training. Thank you for expressing an interest in training at Dasdojo in the art of Kyokushin Karate Group. For hundreds of years positive mental and physical development has been associated with the study of martial arts. We would now like to provide you with the opportunity to experience the benefits Martial Arts has to offer by introducing you to the strongest and largest world Karate organization. Here are a few things you might want to know about us.

DKA is focused on excellence, we are determined to give our best in order to help you achieve your best. You will receive professional instruction and personal attention. During your training, we will go into detailed instruction in the basic fundamentals of working up to the advanced techniques of training. We will not con you. There is only one way to get good and that is to practice. Those who come often and train hard will get to the top of the mountain. We will challenge you all the way up.

Karate is “fun.” It gives students with special needs a boost of self-esteem. The rewards of completing a technique, a kick, a strike, or a punch, enable confidence and pride. Students are willing and excited to demonstrate something they have learned in class. We treat everybody as an individual, and we work hard to meet every person’s needs. We teach students of all ages, and we understand that it is not who we are when we start, but who we become in the process. The DKA programs are an exciting form of mental and physical exercise for men and women, boys and girls, the young in age, and the young at heart. If you are dedicated to attending classes you will meet your goals in the martial arts, and receive additional benefits you never expected. The material is included in your “New Student Packet.” You will find helpful hints and tips to make your transition into marti

Name: BusGates
Description:
BusGates is on a mission to reduce vehicle "drive-arounds" at bus stops, making students safer. Our Patents Pending products is a simple solution to a rising problem - cars ignoring current stop arms and illegally passing stopped school buses putting students at risk.

BusGates products offer a simple solution that easily retrofits to any existing stop sign on school buses. BusGates stop arm extensions offer additional visibility with flashing LED lights and extend 5 feet from the bus to become a physical barrier making "drive-arounds" much harder.

We value your support of our initiative to enhance the visibility of all school buses across the nation.

Name: Real Turismo e Locações
Description:
A Real Turismo é uma empresa especializada em transporte corporativo, fretamento contínuo e soluções logísticas de mobilidade, oferecendo segurança, pontualidade e conforto para colaboradores de empresas em todo o Brasil. Com uma operação estruturada, frota moderna e equipe altamente treinada, garantimos deslocamentos eficientes e confiáveis para organizações que buscam uma gestão de transporte profissional.

Atendemos diferentes demandas de mobilidade corporativa, desde rotas fixas diurnas e noturnas, transporte porta a porta, transfer aeroporto–empresa, eventos, viagens, até operações personalizadas de acordo com a necessidade de cada cliente.

Nossa atuação é pautada por três pilares:
 Segurança operacional – veículos revisados, monitoramento e motoristas capacitados.
 Confiabilidade e pontualidade – compromisso rigoroso com horários e rotas.
 Atendimento humanizado – suporte rápido, comunicação clara e foco na experiência do passageiro.

Com sede em Natal–RN, a Real Turismo se consolida como parceira estratégica de empresas que desejam agregar valor ao deslocamento de seus colaboradores, promovendo produtividade, bem-estar e eficiência no dia a dia.

Real Turismo — Levando pessoas com cuidado, responsabilidade e excelência.

Name: Baruch Transportation
Description:
Baruch Transportation has been serving the Howard County community since 2006. It was the dream of Garfield, who had worked as a school bus driver for more than 10 years in both Baltimore and Howard counties. He has a unique wisdom as a contractor because he was a committed and conscientious driver that genuinely loved what he did. He started out with one bus for 5 years until he secured a second bus, where his wife, Dona, left her corporate job to help build the business. As the business was blessed and grew, the entire Clapperton family has joined in different capacities.

Our philosophy is our name, Baruch (pronounced buh-roook), which means “Bless” in Hebrew. We have been blessed and want to be a blessing to others, including our team, their families, and the community we serve.

Name: Panda Ride
Description:
At Panda Ride, we're on a mission to revolutionize the daily lives of busy working parents, ensuring a smoother, stress-free experience for both you and your children.We understand the challenges that come with managing your little ones' transportation needs while juggling your own busy schedule. 

Have you ever found yourself torn between the demands of your workplace and your role as a parent, where ensuring your children's safe and timely drop-offs at school or after-school activities becomes your top priority? This scenario is all too familiar to many parents.

Our mission is simple: to provide comfort, safety, and reliability transportation. We specialize in planned kids' transportation, even to the tiniest members of your family. Our fleet includes cars and spacious 8+1 microtransits, each equipped with child car seats tailored to various age groups. Safety is paramount, and we make sure your children are securely and comfortably seated during their journey with Panda Ride. 

Did you know that up to 30% of vehicles during the morning rush hour are parents transporting their kids to school? We firmly believe that being a parent should not equate to being a personal driver. Panda Ride is here to give you the freedom to pursue your career and personal endeavors without ever compromising on the safety and well-being of your precious little ones.

Join us on our mission to redefine the way parents manage their children's transportation needs. Panda Ride is your trusted partner in delivering peace of mind and convenience, helping you find the perfect balance between work and family life. Let's make your mornings and afternoons a breeze!

Name: Government M. M. College, Jessore
Description:
In 1942, during the Second World War, the Allies established a base at the college. At this time the college authorities removed the college to the kanchari house (now fire brigade office) of the zamindar of Hatbaria. And there the class begins. When the war ended in 1945, the college was brought back to its former location. At that time, the first name of the college was changed and the name of the best son of Jessore, the great poet Michael Madhusudan Dutt was changed to Government Michael Madhusudan College or M. M. College, in the name of Jessore.

The contribution of some people in the establishment of the college was especially memorable. They are Vijay Krishnaraya, Sri Neel Ratandhar, Vijay Roy, Khan Bahadur Lutfur, Ed. Abdur Rauf. B. Sarkar, Nagendranath Ghosh, Randa Prasad Saha and the teachers of the college at that time.

After the partition of the country in 1947, most of the Hindus left the country and the college faced a temporary crisis. But in a short time it was possible to overcome the crisis with the help of local enthusiastic people. At that time a new committee was formed to manage the college. They were able to run the college very successfully.

Abdur Rahim Joyaddar took over as the principal of the college in 1949 and made some improvements in the college. The B.Com. (Pass) course was introduced in the college in 1956. In 1956, the college was approved by the Rajshahi University for the honors class in the Department of Geography and Economics, Bangla with B.Sc. (Pass) course. Later in 1971 the history department was started. In 1959, Principal Md. Abdul Hai and Jessore District Magistrate, College Management Committee President M. Through the efforts of Ruhul Quddus, arrangements were made to establish the college on a large scale.

Name: 연세대학교 문헌정보학과 Library and Information Science
Description:
연세대학교 문헌정보학과 공식 링크드인 페이지입니다. 연세대학교 문헌정보학과는 1957년 3월, 대한민국 최초의 도서관학과로 설립되었으며, 1990년 3월 ‘문헌정보학과’로 명칭을 개칭하여 정보화 시대를 선도하는 학문으로 자리 잡았습니다. 현재 교육부 4단계 BK21+ 사업과 대학도서관발전연구소를 운영하며, 학문적 우수성과 실천적 기여를 통해 문헌정보학의 새로운 기준을 제시하고 있습니다.

특히, 2024년 QS 학문분야별 세계대학순위에서 Library and Information Science 분야 26위를 기록하며, 연세대학교 내에서 3위를 달성하는 쾌거를 이루었습니다. 이는 문헌정보학 연구와 교육의 글로벌 경쟁력을 입증한 결과입니다.

우리 학과는 정보학 중심의 커리큘럼을 통해 인간, 정보자원, 정보기술의 융합적인 상호작용을 이해하고, 이를 기반으로 지식정보 문제를 해결할 수 있는 전문정보인력을 양성하는 데 주력하고 있습니다. 정보의 수집, 조직, 검색, 활용, 전송 등 정보 커뮤니케이션 전반에 대한 심도 있는 연구와 최신 트렌드를 반영한 실무 교육을 통해 혁신적인 정보 전문가를 배출합니다.

Western Mountain Bus & Auto Sales in 1972 selling school and commercial buses in Idaho, Oregon, and Nevada. In 1982 Western Mountain became the authorized dealer for Thomas Built Buses in Idaho. Over the past 45+ years Western Mountain has gained extensive experience with specialized transportation vehicles and equipment. Western Mountain's owner, Brad Carpenter, has been involved with the company since 1991. Western Mountain's philosophy, which originated with the founder Vernon Carpenter, is to provide the best products available in the market and to provide the best personal service that makes customers, repeat customers. This philosophy continues today and will continue into the future.

By providing excellent products and exceptional after-sale service, Western Mountain has developed an extensive and loyal customer base. Western Mountain's customer focus is consistent with Thomas Built Bus' stated goal of providing buses of unmatched quality and value, which are supported by the best after-sale service in the industry. In 2011, Western Mountain was pleased to introduce used automobile sales to its repertoire. As with our bus and parts sales side of the business, our auto sales department has worked hard to build a reputation for selling high quality used cars backed by extraordinary service. We offer many pre-owned brands, and if we don't have what you are looking for, we can find it. We offer a variety of car financing programs to meet individual needs of our customers.
We have an A+ rating with the better business bureau, we are a Carfax Advantage Dealer, and a member of the Nampa Chamber of Commerce. We are proud to be a part of this great community!

Name: Levi C. Williams School System
Description:
Levi C. Williams Learning resource center was established in 1993 by Madam Hester Williams in memory of her father from Bunker Hill, Harper, Maryland County.

The objectives of the center were to provide early childhood Education, produce reading books and create an environment where children learn and play. The center was opened with one student, Diaboonlay Clinton, who was three (3) years old at the time, one employee, Ms. Lucy Wilson who now resides in the United States of America.

The Levi C. Williams Learning Resource Center expanded her objectives to include establishing an elementary school. Madam Williams visited the Catholic Arch Bishop Michael Francis and informed him of her desire to name the new elementary school in honor of Sister Mary Lauren Browne, a Catholic nun who had been her inspiration and mentor. With the consent of Arch Bishop Michael Francis, the Mary Lauren Browne School of Excellence was established in 2006, to provide primary education to children.

The Mary Lauren Browne School of Excellence provided some of the most eloquent speaking and high academic achievers in Liberia, in the elementary division thus propelling Madam Williams to establish the Levi C. Williams Middle School in 2010.

With request and encouragement from parents and a desire to complete a school system, the Middle School was elevated in 2015, establishing the Levi C. Williams High School with a “First Class” quality education which held its first graduation in 2016.

Madam Williams also established the Levi C. Williams Farm in 2016 with the objectives to promote agriculture in the schools, and encourage students to take farming as a career, and help them develop interest in crop and cattle production to help Liberia become self-sufficient in food.

Madam Hester Williams wrote many readers for children, as part of the objectives of the school system.

Name: Philippine Normal University
Description:
The Philippine Normal University, the Republic known as the Philippine Normal School (PNS), was founded on September 1, 1901, through Act No. 74 of the Philippine Commission as the first institution of higher learning
organized during the American regime.

PNS was converted into the Philippine Normal College (PNC) on June 18, 1949. It became a full-fledged university on December 26, 1991 under Republic Act 7168.

For more than a hundred years since its founding in 1901, the University
has been regarded as the premier institution for the training of teachers
and educational leaders. At present, PNU has four provincial campuses in the country: in Alicia, Isabela; in Lopez, Quezon; in Cadiz, Negros Occidental; and in Prosperidad, Agusan del Sur.

To date, PNU is designated as the National Center for Teacher Education as mandated under Republic Act 9647 signed on June 30, 2009.

Name: Asea Aviation College
Description:
Welcome to the website of ASEA Aviation College.
ASEA Aviation College was established in 1993 for the purpose of producing the country's top-tier technicians in the aviation industry. Since then, it has produced a large number of highly qualified technicians who have played a central role in the development of the country's aviation industry.
In line with the founder's vision, ASEA does its best to cultivate top-notch aviation technicians boasting of both abundant competence and upright moral character.
As part of such efforts, ASEA opened a foreign language institute on campus for the first time among local technical colleges and established the ASEA Future Talent Development Center devoted to moral and character education. As always, ASEA will continue to lead aviation-related vocational education in Korea by introducing the most advanced technology training facilities and curricula.
The aviation industry has kept growing at a fast pace in Korea amid the increasingly higher youth unemployment rate coupled with the lackluster performance of the country's key driving forces for growth. The industry is estimated to record even faster growth down the road given the impressive overall economic growth in Northeast Asia.
Against such backdrop, ASEA has focused on aviation occupational education and produced over 19,000 graduates for the local aviation industry for more than 20 years. ASEA spares no efforts to help each and every one of its students realize their dreams through hard work and integrity.
Today, professional skills count more than one's academic background.
Take on challenges and realize your dreams.
ASEA will help you spread your wings and fly high.
Thank you.

"The prospect of the aviation industry is bright. Choose ASEA, and your future will become even brighter."

Name: Skills & Life
Description:
The growing disparity between the skills graduates possess and those employers seek is a pressing issue. Both public and private educational institutions are struggling to bridge this divide, leaving students ill-prepared for the demands of the workplace. The skills gap is especially noticeable in science and technology. Rapid advancements in these fields require a dynamic and adaptable skill set.

The deficiency of industry-relevant soft skills among graduates is a critical factor contributing to this challenge. Employers seek competencies such as effective communication, problem-solving, and critical thinking. However, academic curricula do not always integrate them.

A misunderstanding between educational outputs and industry requirements in the science and technology sectors presents a challenge. This skills gap does not remain static. Graduates often lack the adaptability, problem-solving, and collaboration skills that employers value. Further compounding this issue is the rapid evolution of industry demands themselves. What constitutes a relevant skill today may become obsolete within a few years, necessitating continuous adaptation from both educational institutions and individuals.

Name: The Dixie Grammar School
Description:
Welcome to The Dixie Grammar School

The key features of life at the Dixie that I highlight to prospective parents when I first meet them are our child-centred approach, our high standards, and the fantastic range of activities, clubs and societies that are available outside the classroom, which do so much to prepare our students for real life.

Small Size
We are small by design and this is fundamental to our outstanding pastoral care. All schools advertise a knowledge of each individual child but at the Dixie it really is the case that all are known by all.  Friendships blossom within and across year groups and crucially, our impressive Sixth Form know and are known by our youngest – their influence and example makes them the most impressive role models.

Academic Excellence and Challenge
Academic excellence is at the heart of what we offer, but we want our students to become well-rounded people as well as achieving highly in academic studies.  Happy students learn most effectively – and we strive for all students at the Dixie to be happy. One criticism of education from employers is that with a curriculum based strongly on an exam system, school children are too often given answers to remember, rather than problems to solve.  The difference between school and life is that in school you are taught a lesson and then given a test; in life you are given a test that teaches you a lesson.  The Dixie gives children challenges so that they may learn from them.  These challenges are within a caring, supporting and guiding environment, where personal and group success is hugely celebrated and where the ratio of adults to children is ideally suited to support individual need.

We strive for the highest standards in all we do - our latest ISI inspection report – far more rigorous than Ofsted - gave us the highest possible grade for every single aspect of school life – including teaching – a rare accolade and a rating not enjoyed by many schools.

Richard Lynn
Headmaster

Name: Metropolitan Transportation Network Inc
Description:
At Metropolitan Transportation Network (MTN), we believe everyone deserves a positive transportation experience. We deliver safe, reliable transportation that accomplishes your goals, adds value and fits your budget.

Our CEO, Tashitaa Tufaa, started MTN in 2004 with a single van transporting students with special needs. Today, the company operates a fleet of more than 400 buses, maintains three bus terminals, and employs approximately 400 drivers, maintenance staff and administrators. What has remained since day one is our company’s focus on transporting people safely, affordably, on time and with respect.

Safety is — and always will be — our first priority. We hold our team to the highest standards, requiring thorough background checks, ongoing training and regular evaluations to ensure our drivers and our fleet meet or exceed safety standards.

We are proud to be one of the largest minority-owned private and local transportation companies in Minnesota.

Name: Fassifern Coaches
Description:
Fassifern Coaches is a privately owned business based in Boonah, Fassifern Valley, Queensland, Australia.  It has had two owners in its 60 year history.  The current owner, Giovanni (John) Musso has owned and operated the business since 2007.  John's vision for Fassifern Coaches has seen the introduction of a modernised fleet and has ensured implementation of efficient and personalised services.

Fassifern Coaches is a fully accredited operator with Queensland Transport. 

There are over 55 drivers currently employed at Fassifern Coaches.  All drivers are very experienced professionals.  The company prides itself on giving back to the community by employing local residents when possible.  All drivers have, at minimum, a Transport & Main Roads Department issued, Medium Ridged Vehicle Licence and a Queensland Drivers Authority (significantly more comprehensive than a Blue Card).  All drivers undertake an annual driver training program to ensure that their driving capacity is maintained to the highest standard.

Fassifern Coaches has a wide range of vehicles in its fleet, ranging from an 8 seater through to 70 seater buses. The fleet features the latest technology in engineering, safety & comfort, along with other attributes including seatbelts, air conditioning, audio visual entertainment, overhead luggage racks & large underfloor storage areas.

We also cater for those with special needs & as such the Fassifern fleet includes disabled vehicles that have state of the art hydraulic wheelchair lifters.

Fassifern Coaches has comprehensive partnerships with all schools in the Scenic Rim - State and Private, as well as multiple, long term private school contracts in & around Ipswich. 

Fassifern Coaches can manage all transport needs including:

* Morning and afternoon school runs
* All school events including camps & excursions 
* Sports transfers &events
* Wedding, parties & special events 
* Depots located in Boonah & Ipswich 

WE LOOK FOWARD TO WELCOMING YOU ABOARD!!

Os serviços de fretamento de vans são para pessoas que prezam por segurança, conforto e economia. Nossa frota disponível para fretamento de vans passa por constantes revisões e é renovada periodicamente. Na Transportadora Nova Taubaté você encontra fretamento de vans de alto padrão.

Name: Ez Buzz Private Limited
Description:
Established in 1981, we have grown and evolved through the years, constantly improving our quality and honing our transportation services adapting to the changing times. With more than 40 years of experience in the transportation industry, it is our core belief in providing professional services and dedicate ourselves to meet our clients’ transport needs in providing value-for-money services.
Our transportation services serve various different needs and industries, whether it’s a school bus for students, minibus for employees alike or a coach bus for a larger size pax or a comfortable limousine chauffeuring for your honoured guests. We have the right solution for you.

Name: مجتمع فرهنگی آموزشی علامه طباطبایی / Allameh Tabatabai cultural and educational complex
Description:
مجتمع فرهنگي و آموزشي علامه طباطبايي، همانطور که از نامش پيداست در وهلهي اول يک مجموعهي فرهنگي و سپس آموزشي است. مؤسسين مجتمع علامهطباطبايي همواره دغدغه مسائل فرهنگي را در اولويت برنامههايشان داشته و دارند از همين روي به تعميق و نهادينه کردن مباحث فرهنگي در مجموعه مدارس خود اهميت خاصي ميدهد. از جمله راهبردهاي اساسي در برنامههاي تشکيل، تحکيم و تعالي مجموعه مدارس علامهطباطبايي، فرهنگسازي و گفتمانسازي، بسترسازي و همسوسازي، آموزش و توانمندسازي و تدوين کاربستهاي پژوهشي در راستاي رشد و تکامل شخصيت فردي و اجتماعي دانشآموزان ميباشد.
مجتمع علامهطباطبايي مدعي است که در راستاي تحقق بخشيدن به آرمانهاي فرهنگي، قدمهاي مؤثري برداشته و مدرسه را از حالت صِرفِ آموزشي خارج کرده و توجه به فرهنگ را در صدر نشانده است. براي اثبات اين ادعا کافي است نگاهي کوتاه به کارنامهي بلند بالاي فعاليتهاي فرهنگي مجتمع علامه طباطبايي انداخته شود تا به روشني صحت اين مدعّا را دريافت. توجه به برنامههاي ملي-آييني و مذهبي در مدارس، برپايي اردوهاي متعدد درون شهري و برون شهري در طول يک سال تحصيلي و نيز برپايي کارگاههاي علمي- فرهنگي، هنري و آموزشي، تنها بخشي از فعاليتهاي فرهنگي اين مدارس است. در بخش آموزش و ترويج مباحث مذهبي، مدارس علامهطباطبايي، کلاسهاي متعددي برگزار ميکند که از آن جمله است؛ کلاسهاي معرفت شناسي و خداشناسي، برپايي نماز جماعت، آموزش قرآن، خواندن هفتگي زيارت عاشورا، برپايي جشن اعياد اسلامي، مانند؛ عيد غدير، مبعث و نيمه شعبان، مراسم خاص مربوط به ماه رمضان همراه با مناجات و افطاري، اقامهي عزاداريهاي ماه محرم و صفر، برپايي جشنوارههاي غذايي به نفع مؤسسات خيريه مانند مؤسسه محک، برپايي با شکوه مراسم دهه فجر و هفتهي دفاع مقدس و نيز برپايي مراسم شب يلدا و عيد نوروز، از جمله برنامههاي فرهنگي است که در جهت تعميق باورهاي ملي و مذهبي دانشآموزان، شکل ميگيرد.

Name: BusBuddy AI
Description:
BusBuddy AI revolutionizes school transportation communication by serving as a 24/7 virtual assistant, seamlessly handling parent inquiries while empowering staff to focus on critical operations. Our platform transforms overwhelming call volumes into streamlined, automated interactions across multiple communication channels.

Through natural language processing, BusBuddy manages routine transportation inquiries via phone, text, and web chat - no app downloads required. Parents receive instant answers about bus locations, schedules, and delays in their preferred language, while staff remain free to focus on safety and route optimization. The system automatically escalates complex situations to human operators with full conversation context, ensuring no inquiry goes unaddressed.

Districts using BusBuddy report 60-80% reduction in call volume, translating to $1000s in annual staffing savings. Parents save an average of 5 hours monthly previously spent waiting for responses, while transportation teams can redirect resources from answering phones to optimizing routes and training drivers. The system's 95% instant resolution rate demonstrates its effectiveness in handling routine inquiries.

Transform your transportation department's efficiency with BusBuddy AI - where intelligent automation meets human expertise to deliver unparalleled service to your community.

Name: ITS-Reizen.nl
Description:
Vanaf de start in 1989 heeft busverhuurder ITS Reizen in Bolsward zich gericht op het betere groepsvervoer. Dat zie je aan de klantenbenadering en -behandeling. Een bus kun je overal huren, maar het vinden van een bovengemiddeld luxe touringcar met een keurig geklede, vriendelijke chauffeur valt vandaag de dag niet mee.

Al is ITS-Reizen een klein busbedrijf, de onderneming biedt meer variatie dan vele groten. Het wagenpark bestaat uit verschillende formaten touringcars. Dat het goed is bij ITS-Reizen bewijst het mogen vervoeren van vooraanstaande organisaties en overheden.

Description:
Our mission is to provide safe, cost-effective and high quality regional school district transportation services which require a total team effort by all employees at Montauk Bus. Name: VNU - Hanoi University of Science
Description:
Mission: VNU University of Science is a research university aiming at high-quality human resource education, talent cultivation, research, development and knowledge transfer in the fields of natural sciences for the building development and protection of the country.

Vision: VNU University of Science strives to become, by the year 2020, an advanced research university on par with the top 100 universities in Asia. By 2030, it will be equal, in some areas, at the most advanced level.

Name: Elm River Township School District
Description:
The Elm River Township School, home of the White Hawks, has been in continuous operation since it first opened for students in September of 1906. Located in beautiful Winona, Michigan, we educate students from kindergarten through eighth grade. We enjoy our small rural school, one of only a handful left in the country. We offer our students special opportunities to interact with children of different ages and a better staff to student ratio than is found anywhere else. Nobody is just a number at Elm River School.

The Elm River Township School prides itself as a K-8 school in a caring community with small town values and character. Our vision is to create a school that is highly regarded for its academic excellence, and for its contribution in actively serving and improving the community in which it operates.

This district provides an atmosphere for a genuinely unique learning experience for younger elementary students. Our viewpoint is that through cooperative learning, students maximize each other’s learning. All individuals who enter these open doors of this small rural school will be encouraged with what they see. The components of a multi-graded classroom learning style with small group interaction and one on one instruction result in positive student achievement. We believe this experience works.

As a community related school district, we are striving to challenge each student, school employee and citizen to rise to the fullest of their potential. In recognizing that our students are, indeed, our future, we are providing a stimulating environment which includes, but is not limited to academic, emotional and social growth in order to develop responsible, caring citizens.
